description: Start one lease-scoped browser session and optionally create its first background tab.
name: start_session
title: Start Session

description: List caller-owned tab leases, or request the read-only target inventory without foreign action handles.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: list_tabs
title: List Tabs

description: Create a background browser tab and lease it to the caller's session.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: new_tab
title: New Tab

description: Claim an unowned target, or perform an explicitly instructed ownership transfer.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: claim_tab
title: Claim Tab

description: Release an owned tab lease and make its browser target claimable. VBL-created targets remain eligible for session-expiry cleanup unless an explicit user instruction requests leave_visible.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: release_tab
title: Release Tab

description: Bring an owned tab and its browser window to the foreground for explicit user handoff or manual inspection.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: focus_tab
title: Focus Tab

description: Close an owned browser target and complete its lease.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: close_tab
title: Close Tab

description: Inspect the compact accessibility tree and obtain lease-scoped element references for semantic actions.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: snapshot
title: Snapshot

description: Navigate an owned tab by URL, history, or reload while preserving application focus.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: navigate
title: Navigate

description: Wait for semantic text, element state, URL, page load, or JavaScript state in an owned tab.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: wait_for
title: Wait For

description: Click one accessibility reference after ownership and actionability checks, returning delivery and effect evidence for quiet submit flows. Use CSS only as an explicit fallback.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: click
title: Click

description: Replace the value of one referenced editable control and return a compact accessibility observation.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: fill
title: Fill

description: Fill two or more referenced form controls sequentially and report completed fields.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

name: fill_form

description: Insert text at the selection of one referenced editable element while preserving application focus.

agent_session_id.description: Explicit fallback handle. Omit this field unless this conversation received session_required, called start_session, and is reusing the exact returned value. Never invent, request, or substitute a placeholder value.

description: Perform select, checkbox, hover, drag, drop, upload, dialog, scroll, or coordinate interaction. Set `operation` to one of: select_options, set_checked, hover, drag, drop, upload_files, handle_dialog, scroll, click_at. Select one or more values in a referenced select control and report the resulting page observation. Supply the caller's `agent_session_id` and owned `tab_id`; tab ownership is verified before browser access. Inspect the structured result before selecting the next browser operation.

title: Specialized Interaction: Select Options
